name: ENDI Corp.
business: ENDI Corp. operates through four reportable segments: CrossingBridge Operations provides investment advisory and sub-advisory services to mutual funds and ETFs; Willow Oak Operations offers operational support services to independent asset managers through minority stakes and service contracts; Internet Operations sells internet access, email hosting, web hosting, and related services to consumers and businesses; Other Operations includes nonrecurring strategic funding and corporate activities.

exposures.sentence: Sitestar.net is an internet service provider (ISP) that offers consumer and business-grade internet access, e-mail hosting and storage, wholesale managed modem services, web hosting, third-party software as a reseller, and various ancillary services.
eBuild Ventures, LLC ( eBuild ) on the Closing Date. eBuild acquires, or provides growth equity to, consumer product businesses in the digital or brick and mortar marketplaces.

On September 8, 2022, through eBuild, we made a capital contribution of $450,000, representing approximately a 10% ownership stake, in a start-up phase private company that operates in the consumer beverage product space.

On March 16, 2023, through eBuild, we made a conditional shareholder contribution of $955,266 and were issued approximately a 3% ownership stake in a private company that operates in the consumer products e-commerce space fulfilled by Amazon.

catalysts.event: Launch of UCITS fund – CrossingBridge Low Duration High Income Fund
catalysts.sentence: On October 23, 2023, CrossingBridge Advisors launched a UCITS fund, the CrossingBridge Low Duration High Income Fund (the CB UCITS Fund ), as a global expansion of CrossingBridge s product offering.

catalysts.event: CBA becomes sub-adviser to RiverPark Short Term High Yield Fund
catalysts.sentence: On March 9, 2024, CBA replaced its affiliate Cohanzick as the Sub-Adviser to the RiverPark Short Term High Yield Fund (the RiverPark Fund ).

catalysts.event: Cohanzick assigns advisory contracts to CBA; CBA issues promissory note for $10,000,000
catalysts.sentence: On March 8, 2024, Cohanzick entered into an agreement with CBA to assign all other investment advisory contracts and additional assets, and CBA assumed certain liabilities arising from such advisory contracts.
